headline: Is It Time To Reassess Onsemi (ON) After Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether ON Semiconductor's recent share price really reflects its underlying value, this article walks through what the numbers are actually saying. At a last close of US$60.46, the stock has returned 2.1% over the past week, while showing a 16.3% decline over 30 days and returns of 6.6% year to date, 38.7% over 1 year, 23.3% over 3 years and 58.6% over 5 years. Recent headlines have continued to focus on ON Semiconductor's position in the broader semiconductor space and...
